description: ALP-001 Career Mode — the fictional company CloudNova. Every lesson, project, and lab takes place within this simulated company. Learners progress from Junior to Principal within one coherent world.

company.name: CloudNova Technologies
company.mission: Build the operating system for modern logistics — connecting warehouses, trucks, and supply chains through cloud-native AI.

tech_stack.compute: Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Azure Functions, Azure VM Scale Sets
tech_stack.storage: Azure Blob Storage, Azure SQL, CosmosDB
tech_stack.networking: Azure VNet, Azure Front Door, Azure DNS
tech_stack.observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Tempo, Azure Monitor
tech_stack.security: Azure AD / Entra ID, Key Vault, Defender for Cloud
tech_stack.ai: Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search, Azure ML

platform_engineering.name: Platform Engineering
platform_engineering.mission: Build and maintain the internal developer platform

infrastructure.name: Cloud Infrastructure
infrastructure.mission: Provision, secure, and optimize all cloud resources

sre.name: Site Reliability Engineering
sre.mission: Ensure reliability, performance, and incident response

developer_experience.name: Developer Experience
developer_experience.mission: Build golden paths, tooling, and self-service capabilities

ai_platform.name: AI Platform
ai_platform.mission: Build and operate the AI/ML infrastructure
ai_platform.manager: Dr. Jordan Taylor (Head of AI Platform)

security.name: Cloud Security
security.mission: Secure everything — from code to cloud

colleagues.name: David Kim
colleagues.personality: Patient mentor, loves diagrams, always asks 'why?'

colleagues.name: Emma Wilson
colleagues.personality: Automation enthusiast, writes Terraform in her sleep

colleagues.name: James Okafor
colleagues.personality: Calm under pressure, incident commander, runs blameless postmortems

colleagues.name: Lena Bergström
colleagues.personality: Backstage expert, golden-paths advocate, developer empathy

colleagues.name: Raj Mehta
colleagues.personality: AI whisperer, loves vector search, always pushing the platform forward

career_progression.title: Junior Cloud Engineer
responsibilities: Pair with senior engineers on infrastructure tasks

tickets.title: Add monitoring to the inventory service
Fix broken CI pipeline for auth-service

career_progression.promotion_criteria: Complete AZ-900 certification and Project 003 (CloudNova Automation Engine)

career_progression.title: Cloud Engineer
responsibilities: Develop Terraform modules for the team

tickets.title: Build a Terraform module for AKS

career_progression.promotion_criteria: Complete AZ-104 certification and Project 006 (CloudNova Kubernetes Production Cluster)

career_progression.title: Senior Cloud Engineer
responsibilities: Lead architecture reviews for infrastructure changes
Own SLO/SLI definitions for platform services

tickets.title: Lead SEV2 incident: API gateway latency spike
Reduce cloud spend by 20% this quarter
Architecture review for new multi-region deployment

career_progression.promotion_criteria: Complete AZ-400 certification and Project 008 (CloudNova Observability Platform)

career_progression.title: Cloud Architect
responsibilities: Set engineering standards across the organization

tickets.title: Evaluate LLM deployment options (Azure OpenAI vs self-hosted)

career_progression.promotion_criteria: Complete AI-102 certification and Project 009 (CloudNova AI Inference Platform)

career_progression.title: Principal Cloud Engineer
responsibilities: Set technical vision for the entire cloud platform
Represent CloudNova at conferences and open source
Hire and develop senior engineering talent
Make build-vs-buy decisions at organizational level
Shape the engineering culture and values

incidents.title: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
incidents.scenario: At 2:47 AM, the logistics API returns 503 errors. On-call engineer discovers the PostgreSQL connection pool is exhausted due to a new microservice not closing connections properly.

incidents.title: TLS Certificate Expiry Takes Down API
incidents.scenario: The TLS certificate for api.cloudnova.io expired. All external API calls fail. cert-manager misconfiguration — automation failed to renew. Manual intervention required.

incidents.title: CI/CD Pipeline Secret Leak
incidents.scenario: A developer accidentally committed an Azure service principal secret to a public GitHub repo. Security detects it within 4 minutes. Immediate key rotation and investigation required.

incidents.title: Kubernetes Node Pool Out of Memory
incidents.scenario: AKS node pool runs out of memory. Pods are being OOMKilled. Memory requests/limits misconfigured. New ML workload consuming unexpected resources.

incidents.title: DDoS Attack on Public API
incidents.scenario: Large-scale DDoS attack targeting the public API. Azure DDoS Protection triggers but need to engage incident response, implement rate limiting, and coordinate with security team.
